personal.name: Hasan Baysal
personal.title: Backend Developer
personal.bio: I work as a backend developer in the .NET ecosystem. I've spent a good amount of time building APIs with ASP.NET Core, figuring out microservices architectures, and wrestling with geospatial data (GIS). I care about system design and database performance—not just making things work, but making sure the code actually makes sense to whoever reads it later.

bullets: Developing and maintaining back-end services for a GIS-based agricultural management platform that monitors crop growth through satellite imagery.
Working on optimization, feature development, and advanced reporting for large-scale geospatial datasets.
Implementing and maintaining microservice-based architecture to improve scalability and modularity.
Handling geospatial data types and GeoServer operations for spatial data visualization and processing.
Project-based contract engagement. Developed the tender management module of an enterprise resource planning (ERP) system using ASP.NET Core and PostgreSQL.
Implemented key functionalities such as bid submission, approval workflows, and document tracking.
Mentored junior developers and provided technical guidance on software architecture, design patterns, and clean code practices.
Developed the Waam Monitoring App, a real-time monitoring and digital twin application enabling seamless communication between PLC systems and .NET Core backend.
Integrated industrial robotic arm data for motion control and optimization within manufacturing processes.
Designed RESTful APIs and visualization components for live process tracking and predictive maintenance insights.
Conducted hands-on .NET Core, C#, and EF Core training sessions for over 50 participants, combining theory with practical workshops.
Designed and developed demo applications demonstrating object-oriented programming (OOP) and database management concepts.
Mentored junior developers and provided technical guidance on software architecture, design patterns, and clean code practices.
Created and continuously updated training materials to align with modern .NET ecosystem standards.
Built and deployed online appointment & video consultation platform using ASP.NET Core MVC.
Integrated 3D Secure payments, DailyCo video calls, SMS, and Google authentication.
Conducted target market research to scope out industry competition and identify advantageous trends.
Contributed to the development of FlashSet, a WinForms-based offline video education platform running directly from USB drives.
Implemented encrypted video playback and secure access control to prevent screen recording and data extraction.
Designed and developed Depo-Kontrol, a distributed inventory and order management system for tracking book stocks across regional dealers.
During my internship, I was involved in server maintenance and update processes for existing web application.
I supported version control and deployment workflows using Git, ensuring stable updates to live environments.
I also made small improvements and bug fixes in PHP-based modules when needed.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science/Engineering
